login.title: Sign in
login.privacyNote: Encrypted locally. Nothing leaves your device without you.
login.connectedAs: Signed in as {{name}}. Enter your Anthropic API key to continue.

errors.invalidPrefix: The key must start with sk-ant-

apiKey.notice: Your key is never sent to our servers. It's only used to talk to the Anthropic API.

google.failed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
google.notice: Connect your Google account to access Gmail, Drive and Calendar.

email.label: Email
email.notice: Your account stays on this device. No server.

slides.title: Hi, I'm Arty
slides.desc: Your personal AI assistant. Ask me anything — I'm here to help.

slides.title: Talk to me any way you like
slides.desc: By text, photo, voice or by scanning a document. I adapt to you.

slides.title: Connect your tools
slides.desc: Gmail, Drive, Calendar — connect your Google account and I'll be able to read your emails, access your files and manage your calendar.

slides.title: Customize the answers
slides.desc: Change the tone (concise, detailed, formal…) and the AI model (Claude, Mistral, Gemini) anytime from the top of the screen. Tap ? to learn more.

tooltips.dropdowns: Change the tone and AI model here
tooltips.attach: Send a photo or a file
tooltips.google: Connect Google to access your emails and files

profileSetup.subtitle: Just enough to personalise our chats. Stays on this device.

home.title: How can I help you?
home.hintHelp: Type <0>/help</0> to see everything I can do

suggestions.title: Suggestions
suggestions.calendarToday: What do I have scheduled today?
suggestions.calendarWeek: Show my calendar for the week

upgradeModal.title: {{model}} is Pro-only
upgradeModal.body: On the free plan you get access to <0>Claude Haiku (10/day)</0> and <1>Mistral (5/day)</1>. To unlock Sonnet, Opus, Gemini Pro and GPT, upgrade to Pro.

privacyWarning.title: Data leaving Europe
privacyWarning.body: This conversation contains messages processed by Mistral (servers in Europe). Switching to {{targetModel}} will send the whole history to the United States. Continue?

input.euOnlyUrlHint: Mistral can't open links (EU mode). To analyze the content, paste the article or video text directly here.

aria.holdToRecord: Tap to dictate, hold for Whisper
aria.autoSendOn: Auto-send on — release the mic to send immediately
aria.autoSendOff: Auto-send off — transcription fills the text area

voice.micDenied: Microphone denied — allow it in browser settings
voice.micDeniedNative: Microphone denied — allow it in Settings → Apps → Arty → Permissions
voice.unsupported: Audio recording not supported in this browser

errors.apiKeyMissing: API key missing — configure your key in settings
errors.apiKeyInvalid: Invalid or expired API key. Check your configuration.
errors.apiRateLimit: Too many requests. Wait a few seconds...
errors.apiOverloaded: The AI server is temporarily overloaded. Auto-retry...
errors.apiServer: Anthropic server error. Try again in a moment.
errors.apiConnection: Connection error ({{status}}). Check your internet connection.
errors.geminiError: Gemini error ({{status}}). Check your key or connection.
errors.mistralKeyInvalid: Invalid or expired Mistral API key.
errors.mistralRateLimit: Mistral request limit reached — retry in a few seconds.
errors.promptEnhancementFailed: Couldn't enhance the prompt — try again.
